query: Uganda Ebola Bundibugyo virus outbreak 2026 latest confirmed case count July 2026, any new case after 20 cumulative
answer:
I've completed the research. Here is the summary of findings on the Uganda Bundibugyo virus outbreak:

**Direct answer:** As of the latest data (12–13 July 2026), Uganda's confirmed case count stands at **20, with NO new case reported beyond the 20 cumulative**. The most recent Uganda confirmed case was reported on **21 June 2026**, and every source through 13 July confirms the count has not moved past 20.

**Key details:**
- 20 confirmed cases, 2 deaths, 16 recovered (ECDC, as of 12 July 2026)
- Last case: 21 June 2026; no new cases since
- ECDC explicitly states: "The last confirmed case was reported on 21 June, and no new cases have been reported since then"
- Count trajectory: 19 (18 June) → 20 (by 21 June–2 July) → held at 20 through 13 July
- Of the 20, 15 were DRC travel-linked and 5 local transmission
- Cross-validated across WHO (DON-612, DON 3 July), ECDC, NICD, ReliefWeb, and outbreak trackers

**Regional context (not Uganda):** The DRC arm continues expanding rapidly (~1,926 confirmed cases, 702 deaths by 8–11 July). PHEIC declared 16 May 2026. Bundibugyo ebolavirus — no approved vaccine.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.snippet: As of 12 July 2026, Uganda has reported a total of 20 confirmed cases, including two deaths; sixteen have recovered. The last confirmed case was reported on 21 June, and no new cases have been reported since then.

sources.title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (WHO DON-612)
sources.snippet: In total, 1481 confirmed cases; 1460 from DRC, 20 from Uganda and one from France; and 454 deaths including two from Uganda, have been reported.

sources.title: Disease Outbreak News: Ebola caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (3 July 2026)
sources.snippet: As of 2 July, Uganda has reported 20 confirmed cases including two deaths, as well as one probable case who has died.

sources.title: Bundibugyo virus disease updates - NICD
sources.snippet: As of 11 July 2026, health authorities had reported 1926 laboratory-confirmed cases (including 702 deaths) in DRC.

sources.title: 2026 Ebola epidemic - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: There have been 702 confirmed deaths in D.R. Congo, and two deaths in Uganda as of the second week of July. PHEIC declared 16 May 2026.

sources.title: Ebola caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (19 June 2026)
sources.snippet: As of 18 June, Uganda has reported 19 confirmed cases including two deaths, as well as one probable case who has died.

sources.title: Ebola Map — Live Global Ebola Outbreak Tracker
sources.snippet: As of 8 July (DRC)/9 July (Uganda): Uganda 20 confirmed cases and 2 deaths; DRC 1,792 cases and 625 deaths.
